{{Quote|I've been there. Very gloomy place. Unnecessarily so.|[[Lumiya]]|<ref name="Legacy of the Force: Betrayal">''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]''</ref>}}
The '''Sith Citadel''', known to the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|reconstituted Sith Empire]] as the '''Great Citadel,'''<ref name="The Citadel Codex">{{TORcite|type=codex|The Citadel}}</ref> was a fortress built by the [[Sith Empire/Legends|old Sith Empire]] on [[Ziost/Legends|Ziost]] sometime before the [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Great Hyperspace War]]. It served as its capital city and the meeting place of the [[Sith Council]].

==Description==
Erected high atop a precarious cliff on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] Ziost, the Sith Citadel emerged above the ground, but also extended well into the planet's surface. The upper levels were made from cheerless [[Color/Legends|gray]] [[Granite/Legends|granite]], while the lower levels were little more than frozen ice [[Cave/Legends|caves]].<ref name="CSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> It was a [[Vergence/Legends|vergence]] that emanated [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] energy. The [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometer]]-long roadway that led to the citadel's main entrance was made of dressed black stone slabs.<ref name="LotF:E" />

==History==
{{Quote|The towering Sith Citadel is among the few remaining structures, and it was adopted as the central meeting place for the original Sith Lords, those Exiles of the Jedi Order who found their way to Sith space following the Hundred-Year War.|An extract from [[Seviss Vaa]]'s account of the [[Ice age (Ziost)|ice age]] on Ziost recorded in ''[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force]]''|<ref name="EGttF" />}}
The Sith Citadel was constructed long before the Great Hyperspace War by the Sith Empire after abandoning its former capital world of [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]]. It was initially intended to be the palace and focal point of the empire, establishing Ziost as the new seat of Sith power.<ref name="EGttF" />

[[File:Ziost.jpg|thumb|right|240px|The Sith Citadel of Ajunta Pall, ancient capital city of the Sith Empire]]
Following [[Ajunta Pall]]'s arrival on Korriban with [[Exiles|his Dark Jedi]] and the creation of a new [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]], he had his Citadel built on top of the palace of [[Hakagram Graush]].<ref name="BoS" />

The capital was abandoned after the Sith defeat during the Great Hyperspace War after being forced to abandon Ziost, among other worlds such as Korriban. However, the empire was not defeated. In secret, a [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|new empire]] was established on the new capital world of [[Dromund Kaas/Legends|Dromund Kaas]]. The new metropolitan center, respectively named "[[Kaas City]]," thereby replaced the Sith Citadel as the primary city in the empire.

Around [[3680 BBY]], the Sith Empire returned to [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic space]] to initiate a [[Great Galactic War|bloody war]] and, at some point, managed to recolonize its former capital world. However, instead of reestablishing the citadel as the planetary capital, the Sith constructed the city of [[New Adasta]] to replace it, overshadowing the ancient castle.

During the [[New Sith Wars]], [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]] member [[Seviss Vaa]] researched the worlds of the Sith Empire, and mentioned the Sith Citadel in his recordings in the [[Telos Holocron]].<ref name="EGttF" />

Millennia later, [[Lumiya]] would visit it some time before the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]. [[Ben Skywalker]] visited this citadel with [[Kiara Olvidan]] while looking for the [[Amulet of Kalara]].
